2.sql: SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal AS areal_m2, omrade, kommunenummer FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class mapping (identify identifier for 'high' risk)'

3.description: get parcels in the municipality with area > 5000 m2 (will use kommunenummer from step 1)

4.description: get quick-clay polygons (utlopomr) filtered to the identified high-risk class from step 2

5.description: reduce high-risk quick-clay polygons to the municipality extent (intersect municipality omrade from step 1 with quick-clay polygons from step 4)

6.description: find parcels from step 3 that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons from step 5

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel (group by teigid and area) to remove duplicates caused by multiple polygon intersections

10.description: attach municipality and county names to the final parcel rows using step 1 (municipality) and fylker lookup if needed

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 returned 0 rows before the plan was complete. Treat this as an empty intermediate result and revise the plan, filter, join, table choice, or predicate.
